description: The Talia are a 'ndrina (sub-clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Bova, Reggio Calabria, Italy. They have been involved in public works corruption, particularly regarding the SS 106 highway and Palizzi road variant, controlling concrete supply, hiring, and subcontracting. The group was targeted in the 2012 'bellu lavuru 2' operation by Carabinieri, which led to arrests of affiliates and external collaborators. They are part of a network of clans including Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti and Vadalà.
